name: Player Movement
description: 2D platformer movement component for CharacterBody2D. Includes walking, running, jumping with variable height, coyote time, and jump buffering. Configurable physics parameters.

landed.description: Emitted when the player lands on the ground

started_falling.description: Emitted when the player starts falling

coyote_time.description: Time after leaving ground where jump is still allowed

jump_buffer_time.description: Time before landing where jump input is remembered

can_jump.description: Check if player can currently jump

get_movement_input.description: Get the current horizontal movement input direction

usage_example:
# Attach to a CharacterBody2D
# Configure speed, jump_velocity, etc. in the inspector
# Make sure input actions 'move_left', 'move_right', 'jump' are defined
